title: Once pares de botas
writer: Vicente Coello, Manuel María Saló, Luis Trías de Bes
actors: José Suárez, Mari Carmen Pardo, Elisa Montés
plot: Ignacio, a professional footballer, has sentimental and labor problems. His girlfriend is about to abandon him because of the constant displays of affection that the player receives from an attractive admirer. At the same time, Ig...
